title: Kevin Hyatt
compiled_truth: Kevin Hyatt is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2007-02-11), Kevin Hyatt sent 609 and received 1856 emails, totalling 2465 interactions.
